programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe makes a bold play to secure capital from a controversial source, while Taylor chafes against his recent moves. Chuck recruits new allies.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe explores an unappealing investment at a desperate moment. Taylor makes a personal compromise for business.

programme.title: The Last Of Us
programme.desc: Joel surprises Ellie for her birthday. Years later, as their rift grows, she prepares to confront him about her past. (S2, ep 6 of.

programme.title: The Last Of Us
programme.desc: Amid the battle between Seattle's warring factions, Ellie's search draws her toward a devastating confrontation. (S2, epof.

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Albie asks Dominic for a karmic payment to help Lucia. Tanya grows wary of Quentin's motives. Ethan confronts Cam. (S2, epof.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Jules learns she can fund her dreams by going on dates with rich men. Strong language, violence and sexual scenes.

programme.title: The Last Of Us
programme.desc: Joel surprises Ellie for her birthday. Years later, as their rift grows, she prepares to confront him about her past. (S2, ep 6 of.

programme.title: The Last Of Us
programme.desc: Amid the battle between Seattle's warring factions, Ellie's search draws her toward a devastating confrontation. (S2, epof.

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Prison officer Amber must escort a criminal to court. When the convoy is ambushed, she shackles herself to him and they go on the run.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Part 1: Pembleton and Bayliss investigate a body found at a burned building, joined by Kellerman from the arson squad.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Part 2: Pembleton and Bayliss continue their investigation into the arson attack, narrowing their search down to a few surprising suspects.

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The majestic Muncaster Castle takes centre stage in this penultimate instalment as the Pennington family discuss the struggles of keeping a stately home afloat. (Episode 5 of.

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The locals decide to raise 150,000 pounds for a memorial commemorating fishermen lost at sea. Plus, Pat considers taking part in a skydive, and the search for scallops begins.

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The tides are turning as Brixham's oldest traditions begin to fade. Pat ponders selling up and visits a clairvoyant, while celebrity chef Mitch Tonks puts on the Crab Festival.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Part 2: Pembleton and Bayliss continue their investigation into the arson attack, narrowing their search down to a few surprising suspects.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Newbie Kellerman is assigned to work with Lewis, as the pair begin an investigation into the death of an elderly lady waiting at a bus stop.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: An attempt on Alma's life prompts Swearengen to take her into protective custody. But who is responsible for the attempted murder? Gritty drama.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Trixie decides to take the Hearst matter into her own hands, leaving the rest of the camp to deal with what she's done... Gritty drama.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe determines his employees' worth at the year-end "comp" meetings. Chuck advances a dangerous plan, but is distracted by a friend in need of help.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe dominates a capital raise event, but is soon challenged by an unexpected competitor. Chuck looks to strike the ultimate blow on an enemy.

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: At the Milanese presentation of her book, Elena unexpectedly meets Nino. Elena's future mother-in-law is very impressed by Nino. Season premiere.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Lenny enjoys a night away from the Vatican with a childhood friend, whilst Voiello has a crisis of conscience when an opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe determines his employees' worth at the year-end "comp" meetings. Chuck advances a dangerous plan, but is distracted by a friend in need of help.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe dominates a capital raise event, but is soon challenged by an unexpected competitor. Chuck looks to strike the ultimate blow on an enemy.

programme.desc: When eight men vanish, Navarro convinces Danvers that the case relates to a past death. With Jodie Foster. Language/distressing scenes. (S4, ep 1 of.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Connolly threatens to give up the case, Navarro and Danvers make a new discovery. Language/distressing scenes. (S4, ep 2 of.

programme.desc: Prison officer Amber must escort a criminal to court. When the convoy is ambushed, she shackles herself to him and they go on the run.

programme.desc: As Les makes great strides in the lab, fear for Lindy's wellbeing intensifies as she discovers her bloodlust. Contains strong language.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Sabi needs to get paid. Paul is blindsided when Bessy makes a big decision without telling anyone. Strong language/mature themes.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Fights, camera, action! The multi-Emmy-winning comedy series returns for a fifth season, as Deborah and Ava are back for more.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Fights, camera, action! The multi-Emmy-winning comedy series returns for a fifth season, as Deborah and Ava are back for more.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Newbie Kellerman is assigned to work with Lewis, as the pair begin an investigation into the death of an elderly lady waiting at a bus stop.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Experience actor Alan Cumming's tour of the UK, as he uncovers the secrets of Britain's cities. Beginning in London, he travels from St Paul's Cathedral to Soho.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming's tour of the UK continues as he uncovers more secrets in urban areas. This week, he's in Brighton where he travels from the toy museum to the Royal Pavilion.

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Summer has arrived, bringing with it the hustle and bustle of tourism. While Pat prepares for a full house, it's up to powerboat instructor Mike to enforce the laws of the sea.

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: This insightful documentary series returns to shore and comes to an end. The fishermen spend some quality time with their loved ones, and Logan has a big decision to make.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Pembleton and Bayliss work with FBI agent Steven Van Brandt to stop a killer working his way up I-95 from Florida toward Baltimore.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Pembleton and Bayliss investigate the murder of a man outside a gay night club.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: In the last ever episode of the gritty drama, election day arrives in Deadwood. The evil Hearst is still in town with unfinished business.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Ian McShane stars in this brutal US drama, set in a lawless town where everyone's a gold-digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Season four begins with Axe closing ranks, determined to destroy Taylor. No longer US Attorney, Chuck struggles to regain power.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe, still focused on wrecking Taylor and their new company, hits it off with a venture capitalist.

programme.title: My Brilliant Friend
programme.desc: As Pietro meets his future in-laws, Elena's mother tries to get her to change her mind about the civil ceremony and Lila sends for Elena.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Nine months into Lenny's papacy, he gives his first audience to the Italian prime minister. Dussolier carries out a controversial edict. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.desc: Season four begins with Axe closing ranks, determined to destroy Taylor. No longer US Attorney, Chuck struggles to regain power.

programme.desc: Axe, still focused on wrecking Taylor and their new company, hits it off with a venture capitalist.
